sections.title: 1. NOT A MEDICAL DEVICE
sections.content: TrueCircle is NOT a medical device, therapy replacement, or diagnostic tool. It provides emotional support and self-reflection tools ONLY. For clinical conditions, consult a licensed healthcare professional.

sections.title: 2. DATA PRIVACY
sections.content: All conversation data is encrypted with AES-256 and stored LOCALLY on your device. We do NOT upload conversation content to servers. Your contact details are used only for account verification and essential support workflows. Support: Settings -> WhatsApp Support or hi@truecircleai.com.

sections.title: 3. THREE-BRAIN ARCHITECTURE
sections.content: Brain-A (104MB): Voice and emotion analysis. Brain-1 (208MB): Pattern recognition. Brain-2 (68MB): Response generation. All models run exclusively on your device. No conversation data is transmitted.

sections.title: 4. RELATIONSHIP INTELLIGENCE FEATURES
sections.content: Relationship Monitoring and Communication Tracker collect structured entries about interaction quality, stress patterns, and emotional impact. These inputs improve personalized guidance quality over time.

sections.title: 5. OFFLINE MODE LIMITATIONS
sections.content: While offline mode ensures privacy, it means we cannot provide real-time human intervention. You are responsible for contacting emergency services when needed.
